1806920.name: Nihmory
1806920.description:
A dying world was reborn when an imprisoned visitor from another realm unleashed a catastrophe that shattered its floating cities and scattered elemental power across the land. Now, centuries later, Eiya one of the few who can hear the slumbering titans must uncover the truth behind that forgotten age and decide the fate of Nihmory.

Features
• Explore a vibrant post-tech world on your goat -like companion.
• Fight with fluid melee, magic, and elemental titan abilities.
• Wield and upgrade Eiya’s elemental weaponry.
• Customize your look with unlockable outfits and weapon skins.
• Shape your journey through quests, exploration, and dialogue choices.
• Gather, craft, and cook to survive the wilds.
• Uncover the secrets of the titans and the power that reshaped the world.
1806920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
